violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned and sanitized can opener during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and urine stains in storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC stated PCS 2-3 times per month. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
Cases of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Particle board is used in the construction of shelving in the dry storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solutions for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -walk-in freezer (ice accumulation at condenser, dripped onto floor) -low-boy cooler door -ceiling tile in dish wash area missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves (dry storage room) have an accumulation of rodent droppings, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed to clean and sanitize shelving units. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The hand washing sink is lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The ceiling above the handsink and alto-sham is in poor repair. Inspector observed missing ceiling panel and discolored tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

The fan unit to the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of dust, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
